extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João attacked with 6km remaining on Monte Bondone, THOMAS Geraint bridged at 4.5km, both gapped ROGLIC Primož by 25 seconds, THOMAS took pink by 18 seconds
tactical_patterns: UAE used VINE Jay to shred group before ALMEIDA João attacked at 6km, revealing Emirates' depth forcing early selection
THOMAS Geraint bridged solo at 4.5km rather than letting ALMEIDA João ride away, reversing typical GC conservatism
ROGLIC Primož lost 25 seconds despite KUSS Sepp surviving, showing even domestique presence insufficient on hardest climbing stages
DUNBAR Eddie moved to 5th GC from breakaway survival after satellite rider positioning, exploiting disorganized magliarosa defense

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: attacking at 36 years old at 4.5km to go rather than defending suggests peak form timing
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: first GT stage win with decisive 6km attack shows readiness to take calculated GC risks
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: negative: lost 25 seconds despite KUSS Sepp support on 5500m climbing stage reveals vulnerability on mega-vert days
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: breakaway positioning gained 250 seconds on 4th place, demonstrating successful satellite GC raid tactics
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: struggled when Jumbo set tempo before final climb, indicating form insufficient for third-week mountain GC defense
